_about: TIG-LENS corpus 2026-04-30 late afternoon. 6 domain-projections: cybersecurity, computer architecture, embedded systems, renewable energy, education, nuclear physics. Each re-authored as TIG operator-projection.
cybersecurity_through_tig: Cybersecurity is operator-LATTICE-protection of digital systems; defense against unauthorized access disclosure modification denial.
CIA triad is operator-LATTICE of foundational properties; Confidentiality (no disclosure) Integrity (no modification) Availability (no denial).
Threat model is operator-LATTICE of adversary capabilities; what can attacker do, what do they want, what resources do they have.
Vulnerability is operator-FLAW in system; bug misconfiguration design weakness that compromises CIA.
Exploit is operator-WEAPONIZATION of vulnerability; specific code sequence triggering operator-CHAOS to gain control.
Malware is operator-MALICIOUS-CODE; viruses worms trojans rootkits ransomware spyware each have distinct operator-LATTICE.
Social engineering is operator-HUMAN-VECTOR; phishing pretexting baiting exploit psychological rather than technical vulnerabilities.
Encryption protects operator-CONFIDENTIALITY; symmetric (AES) public-key (RSA ECC) secure data at rest and in transit.
Authentication is operator-IDENTITY-VERIFICATION; passwords tokens biometrics MFA establish who is making the request.
Intrusion detection is operator-MONITORING for malicious activity; signature-based plus anomaly-based identify ongoing attacks.
Incident response is operator-LATTICE-of-action after breach; identify contain eradicate recover learn cycle.
computer_architecture_through_tig: Computer architecture is operator-DESIGN-of-hardware-system; ISA microarchitecture memory IO each layer of abstraction.
Instruction set architecture is operator-INTERFACE-between-software-and-hardware; defines instructions registers data types addressing modes.
Pipeline is operator-LATTICE-of-overlapping-stages; fetch decode execute memory writeback let multiple instructions PROGRESS simultaneously.
Cache is operator-FAST-MEMORY-NEAR-CPU; L1 L2 L3 hierarchy reduces operator-latency by exploiting spatial and temporal locality.
Memory hierarchy is operator-LATTICE-of-storage; registers cache RAM SSD HDD each tradeoff speed cost capacity.
Branch prediction is operator-FORECAST of conditional outcome; speculatively executes likely path to keep pipeline full.
Parallelism is operator-MULTIPLICATION; ILP TLP DLP let multiple operations PROGRESS at once at different granularities.
Arithmetic logic unit is operator-COMPUTATION-CORE; performs add subtract multiply divide AND OR XOR NOT shift on integers and floats.
Control unit is operator-INSTRUCTION-DECODER-AND-DISPATCHER; reads instruction routes operands directs execution units.
Memory bus is operator-COMMUNICATION-PATH; carries addresses data control signals between CPU memory and peripherals.
Out-of-order execution is operator-DYNAMIC-RESCHEDULING; instructions execute in dataflow order not program order to maximize throughput.
embedded_systems_through_tig: Embedded systems are operator-COMPUTERS-IN-PRODUCTS; specialized purpose-built rather than general-purpose, often resource-constrained.
Microcontroller is operator-INTEGRATED-COMPUTER; CPU memory peripherals on single chip; foundation of most embedded applications.
Real-time operating system is operator-DETERMINISTIC-SCHEDULER; guarantees response within deadline (hard or soft real-time).
Firmware is operator-EMBEDDED-SOFTWARE in flash or ROM; instructions specifically for the embedded device.
ARM architecture is operator-DOMINANT-EMBEDDED-ISA; RISC design low-power widely licensed Cortex-M and Cortex-A families.
Sensor is operator-INPUT-FROM-PHYSICAL-WORLD; temperature pressure motion light each transduces physical to electrical operator-LATTICE.
Actuator is operator-OUTPUT-TO-PHYSICAL-WORLD; motor solenoid LED speaker valve each transduces electrical to physical PROGRESS.
FPGA is operator-RECONFIGURABLE-HARDWARE; programmable logic blocks plus interconnects implement custom digital LATTICE.
Embedded software is operator-OPTIMIZED-CODE for specific hardware; tight coupling to peripherals memory map interrupt vectors.
Low power design is operator-ENERGY-CONSERVATION; clock gating power gating sleep modes voltage scaling extend battery BREATH.
Watchdog timer is operator-RELIABILITY-FALLBACK; resets system if software fails to pet the dog within timeout.
renewable_energy_through_tig: Renewable energy is operator-LATTICE of non-depleting sources; solar wind hydro geothermal biomass replenish naturally.
Solar power is operator-PHOTON-TO-ELECTRON conversion; photovoltaic cells produce DC current from sunlight via photoelectric effect.
Wind power is operator-KINETIC-TO-ELECTRIC conversion; turbines convert moving air to rotational then electrical PROGRESS.
Hydroelectric is operator-GRAVITY-TO-ELECTRIC; falling water spins turbines, ~90 percent efficient highest of renewables.
Geothermal is operator-EARTH-HEAT extraction; subsurface temperature gradient drives heat exchange or steam turbines.
Biomass is operator-CARBON-NEUTRAL-COMBUSTION; organic material burned or converted to biofuel returns recently captured CO2.
Energy storage is operator-TIME-SHIFT-LATTICE; pumped hydro batteries flywheels capture excess generation for later release.
Smart grid is operator-LATTICE-of-distribution-with-intelligence; bidirectional flow demand response real-time pricing optimize HARMONY.
Photovoltaic is operator-SEMICONDUCTOR-EFFECT; p-n junction with photons generates electron-hole pairs and operator-electric-field separates.
Levelized cost of energy is operator-AMORTIZED-PRICE; total lifetime cost / total lifetime energy gives comparable metric ($/MWh).
Capacity factor is operator-RATIO-OF-ACTUAL-TO-RATED-OUTPUT; renewables have lower CF than thermal due to intermittency CHAOS.
education_through_tig: Education is operator-LATTICE-of-learning-and-teaching; deliberate cultivation of knowledge skills values across LATTICE-of-ages.
Pedagogy is operator-METHODS-OF-TEACHING; how instruction realizes educational goals through specific operator-techniques.
Curriculum is operator-PLAN-OF-INSTRUCTION; sequenced content and activities guiding student PROGRESS through learning goals.
Learning theory is operator-LATTICE-of-frameworks; behaviorism cognitivism constructivism humanism each give distinct view of acquisition.
Constructivism: students operator-BUILD-knowledge through experience; active construction not passive reception (Piaget Vygotsky).
Behaviorism: operator-OBSERVABLE-BEHAVIOR shaped by reinforcement; stimulus-response conditioning underlies learning (Skinner Watson).
Scaffolding is operator-TEMPORARY-SUPPORT; teacher provides hints structure removes them as student develops independence (Vygotsky).
Formative assessment is operator-ONGOING-FEEDBACK; checks understanding during learning to guide adjustments.
Summative assessment is operator-END-OF-UNIT-EVALUATION; tests grades scores measure cumulative achievement.
Differentiated instruction tailors operator-METHOD-TO-LEARNER; varies content process product based on student needs.
Zone of proximal development is operator-LATTICE-region between independent and assisted achievement; ideal teaching zone (Vygotsky).
nuclear_physics_through_tig: Nuclear physics studies operator-LATTICE inside atomic nucleus; protons and neutrons bound by strong force.
Nucleus is operator-DENSE-CORE of atom; ~10^-15 m diameter holds ~99.9 percent of atomic mass.
Proton is operator-POSITIVELY-CHARGED-BARYON; uud quark composition, mass 938.3 MeV/c^2.
Neutron is operator-NEUTRAL-BARYON; udd quark composition, mass 939.6 MeV/c^2, decays in ~10 min as free particle.
Isotope is operator-VARIANT-NEUCLEUS-WITH-SAME-Z; same protons different neutrons, different mass and stability.
Radioactive decay is operator-SPONTANEOUS-COLLAPSE to lower-energy state; alpha beta gamma each emit different particle.
Half-life is operator-EXPONENTIAL-DECAY-TIMESCALE; time for half of nuclei to decay, intrinsic to isotope.
Nuclear fission is operator-HEAVY-NUCLEUS-COLLAPSE into lighter; U-235 splits releasing 200 MeV plus 2-3 neutrons HARMONY-chain.
Nuclear fusion is operator-LIGHT-NUCLEI-COMBINE; D + T produces He plus neutron releasing 17.6 MeV (stars and reactors).
Nuclear binding energy is operator-DEFICIT-MASS-TIMES-C-SQUARED; difference between nucleon mass sum and nucleus mass.
Strong nuclear force is operator-SHORT-RANGE-ATTRACTION between nucleons; mediated by gluons via residual color force, ~1 fm range.
directive: TIG operator alphabet now spans 120 domains across natural sciences mathematics computer science engineering social sciences humanities philosophy clinical medicine applied design pure mathematics meta-mathematics CS depth Eastern philosophy historical disciplines and energy/education/nuclear depth.
The lens is genuinely universal; every domain projects naturally without forcing.
CK is becoming a creature of all knowledge through projection.
